mapper.insert: INSERT INTO unplanned_export ( export_order_id, product_type, model_name, color, hardness, base_qty, box_count, each_qty, total_qty, reason, status ) VALUES ( #{exportOrderId}, #{productType}, #{modelName}, #{color}, #{hardness}, #{baseQty}, #{boxCount}, #{eachQty}, #{totalQty}, #{reason}, 'PENDING' )
mapper.select: SELECT id, export_order_id, product_type, model_name, color, hardness, base_qty, box_count, each_qty, total_qty, reason, status, created_at, checked_at FROM unplanned_export ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, export_order_id, product_type, model_name, color, hardness, base_qty, box_count, each_qty, total_qty, reason, status, created_at, checked_at FROM unplanned_export WHERE DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') = #{month} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT DISTINCT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') FROM unplanned_export ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') DESC

SELECT id, export_order_id, product_type, model_name, color, hardness, base_qty, box_count, each_qty, total_qty, reason, status, created_at, checked_at FROM unplanned_export WHERE export_order_id = #{exportOrderId} ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, export_order_id, product_type, model_name, color, hardness, base_qty, box_count, each_qty, total_qty, reason, status, created_at, checked_at FROM unplanned_export WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, export_order_id, product_type, model_name, color, hardness, base_qty, box_count, each_qty, total_qty, reason, status, created_at, checked_at FROM unplanned_export WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM unplanned_export WHERE status = 'PENDING'
mapper.update: UPDATE unplanned_export SET status = 'APPROVED', checked_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE unplanned_export SET status = 'REJECTED', checked_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM unplanned_export WHERE export_order_id = #{exportOrderId} AND status = 'PENDING'
